globalMeta.title: BJHUNT — AI-driven offensive security audit
globalMeta.description: BJHUNT 4 MAX — the AI-driven continuous pentest platform. 317+ orchestrated tools, PCI-DSS / ISO 27001 / OWASP / NIS2 / DORA compliance reporting, signed deliverables.
globalMeta.ogTitle: BJHUNT 4 MAX — AI-driven offensive security audit
globalMeta.ogDescription: Continuous AI pentest platform: orchestrated tooling, signed compliance reports (PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, NIST CSF 2.0, HIPAA, SOC 2, GDPR), CVSS 7-10 prioritization.

contactMeta.title: Contact — BJHUNT 4 MAX
contactMeta.description: Get in touch with the BJHUNT team for security audits, partnerships, and beta access.
contactMeta.ogTitle: Contact BJHUNT 4 MAX — AI-driven security audits
contactMeta.ogDescription: Reach the BJHUNT team for engagement scoping, beta access, or partnership inquiries.

hero.description: AI-powered vulnerability detection. A conversational interface that orchestrates 317+ security tools for complete audits in hours.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered vulnerability detection infrastructure. Automated scans, real-time reports, zero false positives.

cta.title: Ready to secure your infrastructure
cta.description: Join us in building the future of cybersecurity.
cta.subtitle: without compromise?
cta.note: Limited access — spots available for teams in Beta phase.

features.title: AI-First Infrastructure for Cybersecurity
features.subtitle: Tools built for DevSecOps teams who don't compromise.
features.scan_desc: Real-time network detection with topological analysis and service discovery.
features.cve_desc: Synchronized CVE database, CVSS scoring, severity analysis and automatic prioritization.
features.infra_desc: Scan isolation, end-to-end encryption, no data retained on our servers.

api_section.title: Complete REST API. Integrate in 5 minutes.
api_section.subtitle: Documented REST endpoints, available SDKs, real-time webhooks. Integration into your CI/CD pipeline.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.imageAlt: Contact BJHUNT team - Professional cybersecurity customer support
contact.description: Questions about BJHUNT? Want to discuss an integration? Our team responds within 24-48 hours.
contact.directDesc: For urgent requests or technical questions, contact us directly.
contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below. We will respond within 24-48h.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.consent: I agree to receive a response from BJHUNT regarding my request.
contact.confirmationMsg: Your message has been sent. We will respond at
contact.projectStatusDesc: BJHUNT is in active development. Beta launch planned for Q2 2026.
contact.faq1q: What is the average response time?
contact.faq1a: We respond to all requests within 24-48 business hours. For technical emergencies, use support@bjhunt.com.
contact.faq2q: How do I request a personalized demo?
contact.faq2a: Select 'Request a demo' in the form above. We'll schedule a call to present BJHUNT based on your specific needs.
contact.faq3q: Do you offer special rates for startups?
contact.faq3a: Yes, contact us with details about your startup. We have preferential programs for early-stage companies.

legal.label: LEGAL
legal.title: Legal Mentions
legal.ipText: All content on this site (texts, graphics, logos, images, source code) is the exclusive property of BJHUNT or its partners and is protected by intellectual property laws.
legal.termsText: By using the BJHUNT platform, you agree to use it in accordance with applicable laws. Any use for illegal purposes, including unauthorized penetration testing, is strictly prohibited.
legal.privacyText: We collect only the data necessary for the operation of our services. Your data is never sold to third parties. For more information, contact us at privacy@bjhunt.com.
legal.dataCollectionText: We collect: contact information (name, email), usage data (anonymized), and technical logs for security purposes.
legal.cookiesText: We use strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the site. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
legal.liabilityText: BJHUNT provides its services "as is". We cannot guarantee that the platform will be uninterrupted or error-free. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the services used.
legal.contactText: For any questions regarding these legal mentions, contact us at:
legal.copyrightText: All content (texts, graphics, logos, images, software) is exclusive property of BJHUNT. Protected by international laws.
legal.trademarksText: The name "BJHUNT", the logo and associated products are registered trademarks. Use prohibited without written authorization.
legal.aiTechText: The BJHUNT model is proprietary and protected by trade secret laws. Unauthorized distribution = PROHIBITED.
legal.acceptanceText: Access to the site implies full acceptance of these terms.
legal.usageText: Legal use only. Prohibited: harming others' rights, restricting access, compromising security.
legal.warningText: Information provided "as is". No guarantee of completeness, accuracy or availability.
legal.gdprText: Access • Rectification • Deletion • Opposition — Contact us to exercise your rights.
